name: More Power to Ya Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl combine the ground beef, onion, crushed crackers, pepper, garlic salt, dry mustard and eggs.
2. Squish the mixture together by hand until well mixed.
3. Form the mixture into walnut-sized balls.
4. Place the meatballs on a flat wire rack in a roasting pan or a large cake pan.
5. Bake the meatballs in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes, then turn and bake for another 15 minutes more.
6. In a saucepan combine the remaining ingredients (2 cups bottled barbecue sauce, 3/4 cup tomato paste, 1 teaspoon liquid smoke, 1/3 cup catsup, 1/3 cup brown sugar, and 1/2 cup water or as needed).
7. Cook over medium-low heat for 30 minutes.
8. Add the meatballs to the sauce and simmer for several hours. This may also be done in a crockpot. Makes about 60 meatballs.
